title: Class fleece wool
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Class fleece wool demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for wool classing

pcs.text: Arrange the layout of the shed, equipment and facilities according to the determined classing strategy for efficient wool flow, quality management and pressing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Arrange the layout of the shed, equipment and facilities according to the determined classing strategy for efficient wool flow, quality management and pressing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange the layout of the shed, equipment and facilities according to the determined classing strategy for efficient wool flow, quality management and pressing.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and biosecurity risks, apply safe working practices and use available safety equipment in line with work health and safety (WHS) standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and biosecurity risks, apply safe working practices and use available safety equipment in line with work health and safety (WHS) standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and biosecurity risks, apply safe working practices and use available safety equipment in line with work health and safety (WHS) standards.

pcs.text: Identify potential and existing WHS hazards, assess risks and implement control measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential and existing WHS hazards, assess risks and implement control measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential and existing WHS hazards, assess risks and implement control measures.

pcs.text: Establish and maintain sufficient staffing ratio for team work to conduct classing activity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish and maintain sufficient staffing ratio for team work to conduct classing activity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish and maintain sufficient staffing ratio for team work to conduct classing activity.

pcs.text: Place clearly labelled bins and containers in line with the classing strategy, quality management system and workplace traceability requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place clearly labelled bins and containers in line with the classing strategy, quality management system and workplace traceability requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place clearly labelled bins and containers in line with the classing strategy, quality management system and workplace traceability requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for wool classing

elements.title: Carry out classing of fleece wool

pcs.text: Handle and skirt fleece wool to the required standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle and skirt fleece wool to the required standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle and skirt fleece wool to the required standards.

pcs.text: Check wool to ensure freedom from contamination and urine stain
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check wool to ensure freedom from contamination and urine stain?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check wool to ensure freedom from contamination and urine stain.

pcs.text: Check wool to ensure adequate and optimum skirting
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check wool to ensure adequate and optimum skirting?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check wool to ensure adequate and optimum skirting.

pcs.text: Assess pigmented fibre risk and keep wool separate according to workplace standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess pigmented fibre risk and keep wool separate according to workplace standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess pigmented fibre risk and keep wool separate according to workplace standards.

pcs.text: Identify wet wool, urine stain, cotted and coloured wool and keep separate according to workplace standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify wet wool, urine stain, cotted and coloured wool and keep separate according to workplace standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify wet wool, urine stain, cotted and coloured wool and keep separate according to workplace standards.

pcs.text: Appraise wool for its characteristics according to industry code of practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Appraise wool for its characteristics according to industry code of practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Appraise wool for its characteristics according to industry code of practice.

pcs.text: Class and describe wool to standards in line with the industry code of practice and as required by alternative selling methods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Class and describe wool to standards in line with the industry code of practice and as required by alternative selling methods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Class and describe wool to standards in line with the industry code of practice and as required by alternative selling methods.

pcs.text: Identify wool of higher and lower market value and processing requirements and make lines to maximise return to the grower/manager
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify wool of higher and lower market value and processing requirements and make lines to maximise return to the grower/manager?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify wool of higher and lower market value and processing requirements and make lines to maximise return to the grower/manager.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out classing of fleece wool

elements.title: Place wool in bins for pressing

pcs.text: Place wool in the correct bins ready for pressing and ensure that cross-contamination does not occur
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place wool in the correct bins ready for pressing and ensure that cross-contamination does not occur?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place wool in the correct bins ready for pressing and ensure that cross-contamination does not occur.

pcs.text: Check wool flow into bins and communicate with wool presser
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check wool flow into bins and communicate with wool presser?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check wool flow into bins and communicate with wool presser.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Place wool in bins for pressing
